# Nova Meta Plast

> Precision finishing for premium plastic switch components — Color Coating, Hot Foil Stamping, and Laser Marking.

Nova Meta Plast is an Indian manufacturing partner specializing in decorative and functional finishing of plastic switch components for OEMs and electrical brands. Services include precision color coating, metallic and decorative hot foil stamping, and high-precision laser marking (including backlit icons).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Nova Meta Plast, services, process, industries served, gallery, and contact.
